_comment: T2.1 extension — cross-probe scoring job manifest. 3 NEW jobs (pythia chain on UF + qwen on HH + qwen on UF). The pythia_on_hh results EXIST from T1.2 (results/behavior_geometry/). Each job is sequentially runnable. Launch: for job in $(jq -r '.jobs[].cmd' scripts/cross_probe_manifest.json); do uv run $job; done

jobs.description: Score all 5 Pythia DPO LoRA checkpoints against UltraFeedback test_prefs (cross-probe; Pythia trained on hh-rlhf)
Score Qwen2-1.5B-UF-DPO against hh-rlhf test (cross-probe; Qwen trained on UltraFeedback)
Score Qwen2-1.5B-UF-DPO against UltraFeedback test_prefs (in-distribution check; same dataset as training)

post_scoring_analysis.description: After all scoring jobs complete, run correlation + Fig I

total_expected_runtime_note: ~91min for 3 NEW scoring jobs + ~2min correlation pass
